positive: A stylized, maximalist geometric pattern featuring intertwined cosmic elements: nebula swirls, abstract crystalline forms, and glowing minimalist celestial bodies. The composition should be a dense, repeating, symmetrical arrangement suitable for large apparel prints. Use a vibrant, contrasting color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, warm gold, and ethereal lavender. The style should blend psychedelic art with Art Deco elegance, emphasizing clean, sharp lines and strong silhouettes. High contrast, luminous glow effect, vector illustration quality, central composition, perfect tiling, seamless repeat.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noise, text, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, asymmetry, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, gradients (unless necessary for glow), photorealism, signature, branding, logo, typography
